Delegated - Generic: Refer to Minute Clinic Template Sample
Refer to Minute Clinic Template Sample (Same as source)

Roster Type: 1. Source folder named “RawACTRoster” in the path given below in FSX UAT. So this folder will be used as a source folder for Edifecs processes to receive raw files.
Source file naming convention is “xxxxx Vendor_name”.xlsx ; for example- 3326755 Cooper.xlsx or 3341244 Northside.xlsx
2. Edifecs process to be triggered upon the file receipt in the above source folder and generate 4 output files. Naming convention of the files are below.
a. Good file (which is ready for Santech ingestion) - “Vendor-name_<Tab Name>_timestamp”.csv
e. Full File Rejection File Name- "Vendor-name_edifecs_FullFileReject_timestamp".csv
3. Destination folders to be created in FSX UAT as below
a. Destination folder1= \clover\iplus\Provider\EDIFECS\formattedACTroster\ - this is only for good files
b. Destination folder2= \clover\iplus\Provider\EDIFECS\ACTrosterError\ - this is for error report and reject files.
